title: Zoro Faces the World’s Strongest Swordsman
description: On pages 9–12, Zoro confronts Dracule Mihawk, forcing his dream of becoming the world’s greatest swordsman into a brutal and public test.
scene: The Baratie battle pauses around a duel that dwarfs the immediate conflict: Zoro faces the gap between ambition and the world’s strongest swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Someday, one of us will become the world's greatest swordsman!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let's compete to see which of us will be that person!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's a promise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I came to beat this man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll become even stronger for her sake!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I swear I'll become the world's strongest swordsman whose name is famous enough to reach even the heavens!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's pirate Hunter Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: We're the bounty hunters, Yosaku and Johnny!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Even crying babies will almost stop crying by a slim margin at the mere mention of our names!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're impressed by your skill! Let us work together with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What burdens you so?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you still desire at the extent of your strength,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Weaking...?

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: How dare you call our bro a weakling!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We oughta teach you a lesson, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop, yosaku! Johnny! Don't interfere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stay put right here...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffyy...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: DQF!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: World's strongest swordsman! Sounds great! If you're gonna be the pirate King's shipmate,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You should be able to accomplish at least that much! Otherwise, it'll be embarrassing for me!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The world's greatest...

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Bro!!!

summary: This part is a defining moment for Zoro, showing that his dream is real enough to risk death and that his loyalty to Luffy survives defeat.
